title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is an open-source meta-harness that enables orchestration of multiple coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Pi) as interchangeable workers. It provides task planning, implementation routing, code review workflows, human-in-the-loop governance, and cross-device session management for coordinated AI-assisted coding.
writeup: This video covers Omnigent, an open-source meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Pi) as interchangeable workers. It matters because it standardizes how distinct agents plug into a single workflow rather than committing to one tool. The concrete capabilities: task planning, implementation routing across agents, code review workflows, human-in-the-loop governance, and cross-device session management.
